name: Refresh token can only be used once
statusMessage:
XFAIL Refresh token is not one-time use (see issue #2)

AssertionError: Reusing an already-consumed refresh token must be rejected
assert 200 == <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401>
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401> = HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

testStage.statusMessage:
XFAIL Refresh token is not one-time use (see issue #2)

AssertionError: Reusing an already-consumed refresh token must be rejected
assert 200 == <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401>
 +  where 200 = <Response [200 OK]>.status_code
 +  and   <HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED: 401> = HTTPStatus.UNAUTHORIZED

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='Refresh token is not one-time use (see issue #2)', strict=True)

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='Refresh token is not one-time use (see issue #2)', strict=True)
